scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p apps/server/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/importer/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/generator/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/ai/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/data/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/socket/tsconfig.json
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run format:check && bun run typecheck
